title: Cloudflare Turnstile
subtitle: CAPTCHA verification for registration and login forms.
field.enabled.help: Master switch. When off, the plugin is a no-op and no widget appears anywhere.
keys.notice: Get your Site Key and Secret Key from Cloudflare Dashboard → Turnstile → Add site. The hostname registered with the widget should match the forum's domain.
field.siteKey.help: Public key, embedded in the page.
field.secretKey.help: Server-side key used to verify tokens. Stored in NodeBB settings DB.
field.verifyOnLogin.help: Adds the widget to /login. Useful when registration is closed and the login form itself is being abused (credential stuffing).
appearance.interaction-only: Visible only when interaction is required
field.appearance.help: execute hides the widget unless an active challenge is running. interaction-only hides it unless Cloudflare flags the visitor for a challenge.
saved.title: Saved
status.label: Status
error.not-completed: Please complete the CAPTCHA before submitting.
error.failed: CAPTCHA verification failed. Please try again.
